posts.name: Resend CLI 2.0

From shopping comparisons to productivity boosts, streamline browsing with smarter, repeatable AI actions.

These agents show up for every candidate, every time, never cancelling, never drifting, and never showing bias. With a smart browser, real-time video proctoring, and AI-likeness detection, OnScreen ensures every interview is verified and truly cheat-proof.

posts.name: Astropad Workbench

Apple-native, with voice dictation and low-latency streaming powered by LIQUID, our proprietary tech. Built by ex-Apple engineers.

That's how you go from knowing patterns to understanding systems. Export to PNG, Mermaid, or Python for your docs and repos. 7 blocks, 12 behaviors, AI that turns code or prompts into live diagrams. Free in your browser.

posts.name: Avec

(2) Write with your voice: Record a quick voice note and let Avec turn it into a clear email that sounds like you. (3) Clear your inbox: Not every email deserves the same attention. After you’ve handled the important ones, clear the rest with a swipe. Unsubscribe and block spammy senders with one tap.

posts.name: FunKey

posts.name: Qart App
posts.tagline: A pause button for the checkout moment
posts.description: Qart is for people who love shopping but want to be intentional about what they buy. Instead of checking out while online shopping, save items to Qart. You set a pause period — a few days, a week, whatever feels right — and when it ends, you decide: still want it, pass on it, or wait a little longer. It's not a budgeting app, no spending limits; just a little space between wanting something and owning it. The things you still want after waiting, you buy. The things you don't, you pass on.

It lives in the menu bar and focuses on one job: giving you timely nudges that make healthier charging habits easier to maintain.
